title: Replacing a view by a query on the view itself crashes the server.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS t7240 (val INT NOT NULL, name VARCHAR(50));
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW v7240 AS SELECT val, name FROM t7240 WHERE val > 1;
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW v7240 AS SELECT * FROM (SELECT val, name FROM t7240 WHERE val > 1) AS temp WHERE name IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Replacing a view with a query on itself
